query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN description IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_description,
  SUM(CASE WHEN maxDepth IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_maxDepth,
  SUM(CASE WHEN minDepth IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_minDepth,
  SUM(CASE WHEN marineLife IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_marineLife,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bestSeason IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_bestSeason,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rating IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_rating
FROM activity_spots WHERE spotType = 'dive_site';
